name: Gwen Moore
subject: Block by block
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donna Edwards for Senate
body:
Friend,
I am on the ground in Maryland volunteering for Donna because these next 24 hours will decide if we make history in 2016 and elect a true progressive to the Senate.
Block by block, she and I canvassed across Baltimore yesterday because each and every vote is that important.
**[If I can come all the way from Wisconsin to volunteer for Donna's grassroots campaign, you can get out there too. Sign up to volunteer now and get out the vote.](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feffb9/767134fb/5c416ba3/433804fb/390234856/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1Y2YVhBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDI0LU1EIn0=/ "http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/s/get-out-the-vote-for-donna?source=em20160424-MD&firstname=&lastname=&zip=20902&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**
This is your last chance to make a difference and make sure every voice is heard to elect Maryland's first and only African American woman Senator.
Donna's stepped up to empower all of us and bring our perspective to the decision making table. I am so proud of her journey -- a determined single mom, lawyer, and community activist who went to Congress, fought for working families, and wants to take her progressive vision to the Senate.
I need a Senator like Donna who's going to stand with me in tough fights to uplift our middle class and struggling families. But we only achieve something so great by rising to the occasion in these final hours to get out the vote in Maryland.
**[Sign up to volunteer now and get out the vote for Donna.](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feffb9/767134fb/5c416ba3/433804fb/390234856/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1Y2YVhBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDI0LU1EIn0=/ "http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/s/get-out-the-vote-for-donna?source=em20160424-MD&firstname=&lastname=&zip=20902&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**
Let's get her to the Senate. We must build on Barbara Mikulski's legacy of women's leadership and always putting working families first.
Thank you,
Rep. Gwen Moore

subject: Five states
body:
We've ramped up our efforts to stop Trump and ensure that we
prevent him from securing the nomination.

Peter, we've ramped up our
efforts to stop Trump and ensure that we get to an open
convention where delegates will select the candidate who's best
prepared to defeat Hillary Clinton.

Tomorrow is a critical step as we
have the opportunity to gain delegates in five more states.

We've set a goal of raising
$25,000 more to help with our last minute Get-Out-The-Vote
programs. Can you help us out?

Your contribution of $10 or more
before TONIGHT earns you a chance to receive one of five
limited-edition #TeamKasich iPhone cases.

Peter - Can you help us hit our
goal of raising $25,000 more?

>> CHIP IN $25 <<

>> CHIP IN $50 <<

>> CHIP IN $100 <<

With a Trump/Cruz nomination,
we'd lose the White House, our majority in the U.S. Senate, the
Supreme Court and countless other races around the country!

Peter, help us win more
delegates on Tuesday and head into the convention with the wind
at our backs!
Thank you.

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio & Presidential
Candidate

name: Mike Mikus
subject: what happens now
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-836088312711086080/-260904213666594816?refcode=e20160425.3&refcode2=e20160425.3nd&amount=25)
---
Friend,

In less than 24 hours, the polls will be open on Primary Day and folks across Pennsylvania will make their choice about who will face off against Pat Toomey in November.

I can't tell you which candidate is going to win. This one's going to be close, and it's going to come down to the wire. **But I can tell you this -- the campaign that fights for every last vote until the very last minute before the polls close has the best shot at victory.**

Let's make sure that campaign is Katie's. We're making our final decisions about where we can put resources, and every dollar we raise tonight will go towards turning out voters tomorrow.

[**Pitch in now for our last big GOTV push for Primary Day! We still need to raise $5,253 by midnight.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-836088312711086080/-260904213666594816?refcode=e20160425.3&refcode2=e20160425.3nd&amount=25)

I say it to anyone who will listen (and plenty of folks who won't): **I 'm so proud of the grassroots campaign we've built together**. We started out as the underdog, and neighbor by neighbor and voter by voter, we've turned this race into one of the most competitive Senate primaries in the country.

There are less than 24 hours to go but Katie's pounding the pavement -- earning every single vote. As long as folks like you keep standing with us, I think we'll come out on top.

[**Make a last minute contribution to get Katie across the finish line.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-836088312711086080/-260904213666594816?refcode=e20160425.3&refcode2=e20160425.3nd&amount=25)

Now let's go win,

Mike

name: Rob Portman
subject: priority message
body:
| Peter --

I have something important to tell you, but first I want to give you a quick update about the campaign!

This weekend, we contacted 67,544 voters on Super Saturday! Peter, this is a huge number. I am very proud of the campaign we’ve built together and I am grateful for everyone’s help. With your support, we have the strongest grassroots campaign in the country.

**Now let me tell you the important news**.

Because of our strong grassroots support, the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) has reserved $10,000,000 in attack ads for the fall.

But it gets even worse.

Harry Reid’s SuperPAC just spent nearly $1,000,000 against me on television ads. I must be able able to fight back.

On top of that, Hillary Clinton is spending millions of dollars in Ohio to build up her field team for the general election -- which will only help Ted Strickland.

Peter, I must ask for your help. Because our grassroots support is so strong, I have decided to launch an end of the month online fundraising goal of $67,544 -- one dollar for every voter we contacted on Super Saturday! Are you able to help me fight back against all of these negative attacks?

Ohio simply can't afford a return to Ted Strickland's Ohio when our state lost more than 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation. Please let me know if you can donate right away. I must raise this money before midnight on April 30th. Thank you so much for your help.

You can donate by using this link: [https://robportman.com/april_goal

](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/april_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom_01&n=7 "Donate Here!") All best,
Rob [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom_01&n=8)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom_01&n=9)[](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/april_goal?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_eom_01&n=10 "Donate Here!")

subject: Dancing in the rain
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171987c/3476a20e/dad51df/27424d7b/1089521719/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, This past Christmas, the final present my daughter handed me was an old wooden sign upon which were painted the words, "Life is not about waiting for the storm to pass ... it is about learning to dance in the rain." When I now look at Alex's sign above my desk in campaign headquarters, I know there was a time when just saying "yes" to Washington D.C.'s politics of power would have meant avoiding the storm of the establishment ... and yet I know that I would rather be dancing in the rain - with the people, and principle. | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171987c/3476a20e/dad51df/27424d7a/1089521719/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM04253FBg1")
---
I don't mind getting wet, for I only want to dance well and win for you, to bring integrity of service above all else to public life. Politics is a storm, but it doesn't have to sweep all before it ... nor will it, with your help.
We will win, but because of the extra votes you can bring in by sharing your support for me with your family and friends via Facebook, Twitter, email, and phone calls.
This is what I most ask now - dance with me in the rain, and convince people to come out and dance with us by voting for Joe Sestak!
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/171987c/3476a20e/dad51df/27424d79/1089521719/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM04253FBb1")
---

Joe

name: Katherine Van Hollen
subject: all on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|

>
> Friend, tomorrow voters across Maryland head to the polls to choose their nominee to be our next Senator. Marylanders I have talked to from all genders, races and creeds are eager to elect someone, like Barbara Mikulski, who will work tirelessly to get results for them -- and for our state and country.
>
> For over a year now we have run a strong positive campaign focused on the issues and Chris's record. I'm not new to campaigns and I know they can get nasty. Before voters head to the polls | Friend --

Quick update on the state of the race:

Bernie's campaign is outspending us by $1.6 million on the air across the five states that vote tomorrow. The polls are tightening in Pennsylvania and we're running neck-and-neck in Connecticut and Rhode Island.

If we want to lock up this nomination for Hillary once and for all, we’ve got to win big tomorrow -- and that depends on what we all do today.
